name: Multimodal longevity APRC-CM pilot
summary: Single-arm open-label pilot in healthy adults testing a 17-week multimodal longevity protocol that included lifestyle optimization, supplements, and two intravenous autologous pro-regenerative conditioned-media infusions.
population: Healthy adults aged 46 to 72 years enrolled in a multimodal longevity protocol

trial_details.horizon_note: A Frontiers in Aging accepted article reports study results, while ClinicalTrials.gov still has no posted registry results in the June 15, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Extracellular Vesicle and Secretome Therapies because they test a secretome-adjacent conditioned-media component in a healthy-aging protocol with biological-age biomarkers. The single-arm multimodal design does not isolate the conditioned-media contribution or prove durable functional benefit.
